title: Changed hosting model for beskid platform services

source.subject: Changed hosting model of beskid services

body:
Documents and wires separate Coolify apps for site, auth hub, tracker, nexus, and pckg instead of monolithic deploy assumptions; updates AGENTS.md service matrix.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`eb2aa21`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/eb2aa21)
- **Subject:** Changed hosting model of beskid services
- **Completed:** 2026-05-26

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4 (Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling)
- **Workstream:** `platform-docs-dx`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-platform-dx`

## What shipped

Documents and wires separate Coolify apps for site, auth hub, tracker, nexus, and pckg instead of monolithic deploy assumptions; updates AGENTS.md service matrix.
